description: A brief note about 4 raṭl of a unknown good in the name Lūlī al-Ḥāmī (first name is likely a nickname or a variant of Luʾluʾ). Dated R[amaḍān?] [1]189 AH which is 1775/1776 CE. The scribal hand, paper, and surname all fit this dating. Location: Cairo (מצריים). Based on the layout of this document it seems likely that it was an individual receipt rather than a fragment from a broader array of accounts. MCD.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
